title: valerianella dentata subsp. eriosperma
intro: Valerianella dentata subsp. eriosperma, also known as Spring whitlow-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spring whitlow-grass include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Spring whitlow-grass can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
